form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 3 length third but did clock a useful 18.19 over the 320m journey. Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 320m (17.97) beating Grid Girl in Grade 3/4 on April 10. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Bulli over 340m. Looks up against it this time.

form.formComment: Form has been strong with wins two and three starts back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 1 over 320m at this track behind Canya Supersonic beaten a nose (18.20). Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Comes off a (18.05) win last time, scoring by 1.75 lengths in a NG over 320m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and four places from six starts. Among the chances on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn crowded for room and came together.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.29) when fourth over 515m at Gosford in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Will need the right run.
